body:
## Problem

The /stats/gear-insights SSR handler (api/meta/[...path].js:215-222) returns title + description (#1303 approved) but NO structured data JSON-LD.

The parent /stats page (line 196-212) DOES emit Dataset schema with variableMeasured, creator, etc. The /stats/gear-insights sub-page with richer brand-usage % data has none.

This page is uniquely citeable: 'What percentage of metal drummers use Tama?' — AI systems need Dataset schema to cite stats data with confidence.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js, /stats/gear-insights return block (line 215-222)

Add articleSchema to the return:
  articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
    '@context': 'https://schema.org',
    '@type': 'Dataset',
    name: 'Metal Drummer Gear Brand Usage Statistics',
    description: 'Brand-by-brand usage percentages across 60+ pro metal drummers — drum kits, cymbals, pedals, sticks.',
    url: BASE_URL + '/stats/gear-insights',
    creator: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
    variableMeasured: ['Drum kit brand market share', 'Cymbal brand usage %', 'Pedal brand usage %', 'Stick brand usage %'],
    temporalCoverage: '1980/..',
    spatialCoverage: 'Global',
  })

## Status

ALREADY SHIPPED — fix landed in commit 9ce786f (PR #1536). No further changes needed.
title: SEO: /stats/gear-insights page — add Dataset JSON-LD schema to SSR handler
